_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Schwann cell proliferation was assessed on day 8 following merlin-targeted siRNA transfection and controls, using the BrdU assay
details: Successfully used to assess Schwann cell proliferation on day 8, demonstrating increased proliferation with merlin depletion
